Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as the ruling of the Court. PETITIONER BLACKHAWK NETWORK, INC.'S Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the Proposed Order and the Proposed Judgment submitted by email. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
